title: STAT+: As artificial intelligence shows off diagnostic chops, scientists reckon with the way forward
summary: On Thursday, researchers published in Science the results of a study that tested an OpenAI model on diagnostic and clinical reasoning tasks.

title: Trump drops Casey Means as surgeon general nominee, opts for radiologist Nicole Saphier
summary: Trump slammed Sen. Bill Cassidy for blocking his surgeon general pick, as he nominated a replacement.

title: Merck still sees ‘compelling’ outlook for Terns leukemia drug
summary: Despite updated study data that suggest Terns’ treatment may be less differentiated, company executives claimed Thursday that it still could be an important step forward in care.

title: UniQure, in ‘symbolic’ win, to seek UK approval of Huntington’s gene therapy
summary: News of the submission, which would be the first for UniQure’s closely watched treatment, comes as the therapy faces an uncertain future in the U.S.

title: STAT+: FDA wants to exclude weight loss drugs from a compounding list
summary: FDA moves to remove semaglutide, tirzepatide, and liraglutide from its 503B compounding list, saying there's no shortage of GLP-1 drugs from Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly.

summary: Elevance said a top exec would depart, days after the Justice Department asked to depose him.

title: STAT+: Hinge has a new FDA-cleared migraine device
summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: FDA's plan to use AI to speed up trials, Hinge's new migraine device, and boosting cancer screening with texts.

title: FDA Proposes to Exclude Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, and Liraglutide on 503B Bulks List
summary: FDA is proposing to exclude semaglutide, tirzepatide, and liraglutide from the 503B bulks list, finding no clinical need for outsourcing facilities to compound these drugs from bulk substances.

summary: FDA announces results from the largest and most rigorous examination ever conducted focused on chemical contaminants in infant formula available on the U.S. market.
